transcript:
CALLER: Hello. I need to shift my father's physiotherapy session. He has some pain and the physio himself suggested resting for a few days.
AGENT: Oh understood, rest is important. Your father's name and current appointment?
CALLER: Chandrakant Divekar. He has tomorrow at 10 AM with Mr. Ganesh Khot.
AGENT: Got it. Shall I reschedule to next week? Mr. Khot has Monday and Wednesday mornings open.
CALLER: Wednesday, next week please. Same 10 AM if possible.
AGENT: 10 AM Wednesday next week — confirmed for Chandrakant Divekar. Hope he recovers well. SMS will be sent.
CALLER: Thank you for understanding.
